text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega appears empty inside, sinking
deeper into the despair of having lost her sister.
Then, T.M. Opera O comes, bellowing with
laughter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Demanding I be the chaperone for her, Admire
Vega, and the others, she whisks us both away
without giving an explanation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're taken to the beach at night. Confused,
Admire Vega attempts to leave but is quickly
instructed by T.M. Opera O to stay until morning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the sun rises and the morning star disappears,
Narita Top Road asks Admire Vega to go for a
run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They run, letting everything out, driven forward
by their joy and desire to keep running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega then makes a new vow, to run not
for the sake of atonement, but to make her sister
proud.
